label: Table_1
caption: Table 1. %Yield of phytochemicals in different extracts of the leaves of C. nocturnum .
markdown:
Table 1. %Yield of phytochemicals in different extracts of the leaves of C. nocturnum .

| Extract         |   %Yield Leaf Extract |
|-----------------|-----------------------|
| n -Hexane       |                  1.44 |
| Dichloromethane |                   1.9 |
| Ethyl acetate   |                  0.71 |
| Methanol        |                  7.63 |
| Aqueous         |                  6.38 |

markdown:

| DPPH       | Aq.                      | NS                |
